description: Create a tiddler titled 'CRM Dashboard' tagged 'Dashboard' to aggregate data from the 12 existing client tiddlers. The dashboard must include an '!! Active Clients Pipeline' section with an HTML table (Client Name, Industry, Revenue) dynamically populated with 'Active' 'Client' tiddlers sorted by 'revenue' in descending numeric order using the <$list> widget. It must also include a '!! Pipeline Metrics' section with a bulleted list displaying dynamically calculated values for Total Active Revenue, Total Prospect Revenue, and the Largest Active Deal using filtered transclusion math operators.
